name: medcloud-api-v4
description: MedCloud API v4 — Sprint 2-4 complete backend

scripts.package: npm install --omit=dev && zip -r lambda-v4.zip index.mjs node_modules/ && echo 'Packaged: lambda-v4.zip'
scripts.deploy: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name medcloud-api --zip-file fileb://lambda-v4.zip --region us-east-1
